name: 4-digit Postal Codes Switzerland
snippet: The current postal codes in Switzerland (CH) range from 1000 – 9999. The lowest 4 - digit postal code (1000) starts in the southwest area of Lausanne.

name: Official directory of towns and cities - Swisstopo
